name: Alicia's Flour Tortilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients and sift.
2. Add lard and mix until combined.
3. Gradually add warm milk, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth.
5. Divide into pieces and roll out flat to desired thickness.
6. Cook each tortilla on a hot griddle or skillet until lightly spotted, about 1-2 minutes per side.
